notes: Played the intro, works perfect and smooth, missing the intro speech like android has (but do not know if this is a proton or general steam version problem).
title: Leo’s Fortune - HD Edition

notes: Works very decent: framerates are okay, everything looks as crisp as on windows and as far as I can tell everything works...with one exception: Music and all the voice-work (leaving only sound effects as audio). While this game certainly doesn't rely on it too much, it is certainly a miss compared to the windows version.
title: Leo’s Fortune - HD Edition
